name: Emeril's Funky Fried Steak
recipeIngredient: 2 cups roasted garlic mashed potatoes, hot
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat a cast-iron skillet with vegetable oil.
2. Season each side of the cutlets heavily with Southwest seasoning.
3. Season the flour with Southwest seasoning.
4. Dredge the cutlets in the seasoned flour, coating both sides completely.
5. Dip each cutlet in the beaten eggs, letting any excess drip off.
6. Return the cutlets to the seasoned flour and coat both sides again.
7. Place the cutlets in the hot oil and fry for 3-4 minutes per side.
8. Remove the steaks from the oil and drain on a paper-lined plate.
9. Season the steaks with salt and pepper.
10. Mound the hot mashed potatoes in the center of the plate.
11. Drizzle Worcestershire sauce around the potatoes.
12. Place the steaks on top of the potatoes.
13. Spoon gravy over the steaks.
14. Garnish with chopped chives and brunoise peppers.
Yield: 4 servings
